originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Porting Trash Pickup Policy to C and Deploying on Website
summary: Worked on the trash pickup environment: fixed observation space by changing from float to signed char and adding a carrying channel, optimized memory layout for C, trained a policy, ported it to C using pufferlib, and deployed it on the website. Also updated documentation and helped a contributor with import issues.
